problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Dopamine/serotonin. Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
